name: Eric Burdon
abstract: Eric Victor Burdon (born 11 May 1941) is an English singer and songwriter. He was previously the lead vocalist of the original lineup of the R&B and rock band the Animals and the funk band War.

concerts.label: Lead Belly Fest
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: just before Eric Burdon and The Animals. We met in London, I was with Charles.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
